citation.description: ARCHIVE_MARKER_NAME and MARKER_LOCK_NAME imported from reducer/marker.py and included as */.archived and */.write.lock in _GITIGNORE; _gitignore_unit handles both new creation and migration of existing stores (lines 414-453).

criteria.criterion: Per-ticket .archived and .write.lock runtime markers are ignored in new and migrated ticket stores.

citation.description: test_collects_canonical_children_and_both_prerequisite_directions calls rebar.archive() (creating .archived + .write.lock markers) then collect_plan_relation_snapshot which calls real tracker_head_sha. test_archiving_leaves_only_ignored_per_ticket_markers in tests/interfaces/store/test_lock_gitignored.py directly verifies no untracked files after archiving (lines 71-81).

criteria.criterion: tracker_head_sha succeeds on an otherwise-clean store containing those markers.

citation.description: test_tracker_head_sha_requires_clean_valid_git_head places an untracked dirty.txt and asserts tracker_head_sha raises PlanRelationSnapshotError with reason=store-read-failure, proving the git status --porcelain check is intact and unweakened.

criteria.criterion: Genuine untracked event files remain visible to git status and still produce store-read-failure.

citation.description: Drift matrix S4 tests stale gitignore migration; _assert_converged verifies all _GITIGNORE lines are present. tests/interfaces/store/test_lock_gitignored.py covers seeded gitignore (including */.archived and */.write.lock) and archiving. tests/unit/test_plan_relation_snapshot.py covers all relation snapshot scenarios. No skips or xfails found.

criteria.criterion: Existing gitignore ensure tests and focused relation snapshot tests pass.

citation.description: Ticket comment attestation (2026-07-21 America/Los_Angeles): Gerrit #875 merged with LLM-Review +1 and Verified +1 (CI 29886053149); origin/main contains commit a09c08754. rebar init --silent migrated tickets .gitignore at commit 51e5b186e; git -C .tickets-tracker status --short produced no output; rebar review-plan 75de-02b0-d454-410b --ref HEAD --output json advanced past store-read-failure into snapshot reduction. Names specific reference IDs, observed outcomes, and a timestamp.

criteria.criterion: [operator-attested] The live store is clean after supported recovery and 75de plan review advances past store-read-failure to its next validation gate.
